'''Duman Yaght''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of [[Domain Yaght]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. The commanding officer of the ''[[Exquisite Death]]'', he received seventeen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] captives from [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Fitzgibbon Lane]], who was in truth [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], in the plot to deliver the Jedi to [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]] for the [[Mission to Myrkr]] <ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star" /> in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]].<ref name="Date" />

After torturing the Jedi aboard, he later held [[Ganner Rhysode]] hostage when the Jedi hijacked the ship. [[Anakin Solo]] rescued Ganner, and [[Tesar Sebatyne]] blasted Duman's head away.<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star" />
